title: adicea fruticosa
intro: Adicea fruticosa, also known as the False Kola, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Adicea fruticosa is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
